APIConfig.description:
Manual override API settings for the scheduler.

Exposes a ``POST /api/trigger`` endpoint for on-demand job execution —
useful for backfills and misfire recovery (SRC-147).

Traces: SRC-147 (manual override endpoint)

YAML example::

    api:
      enabled: true
      host: "0.0.0.0"
      port: 8081

enabled.description: Enable the manual override HTTP API.
enabled.title: Enabled

host.description: Bind host for the scheduler API.
host.title: Host

port.description: TCP port for the scheduler API (default: 8081).
port.title: Port

APIConfig.title: APIConfig

AgentRegistration.description:
A single entry in the ``scheduler.yaml`` agents registry.

Each registration links an agent ID to its per-agent YAML config file.
Disabled agents are skipped at scheduler startup without errors (SRC-072).

Traces: SRC-072 (multi-agent discovery from scheduler.yaml)

YAML example::

    agents:
      - id: default
        config: configs/default-agent.yaml
        enabled: true
        description: "Default business + society AI news curation"

id.description: Unique agent identifier. Must match the ``agent_id`` in the referenced YAML.
id.title: Id

config.description: Relative or absolute path to the per-agent YAML configuration file.
config.title: Config

enabled.description: Set false to skip this agent at scheduler startup. Useful for staging configs that are not yet ready (SRC-072).
enabled.title: Enabled

description.description: Human-readable description of this agent's curation theme.
description.title: Description

AgentRegistration.title: AgentRegistration

RetryConfig.description:
Retry policy for failed scheduler jobs.

Implements exponential backoff: ``base → base*2 → base*4``.
Default: 30s → 60s → 120s (three retries).

Traces: SRC-144 (3 retries with exponential backoff)

YAML example::

    scheduler:
      max_retries: 3
      retry_backoff_base_seconds: 30

max_retries.description: Number of retry attempts after first failure (SRC-144).
max_retries.title: Max Retries

retry_backoff_base_seconds.description: Base sleep interval in seconds for exponential backoff. Pattern: base → base*2 → base*4 (SRC-144). Default: 30 → 60 → 120 seconds.
retry_backoff_base_seconds.title: Retry Backoff Base Seconds

RetryConfig.title: RetryConfig

TriggersConfig.description:
Cron expressions for all sourcing and curation jobs (UTC).

All expressions are five-field standard cron format:
``minute hour day_of_month month day_of_week``

Traces: SRC-009 (daily sourcing 00:00 UTC),
        SRC-028 (curation at beginning of next window),
        SRC-029 (daily curation), SRC-030 (weekly), SRC-031 (monthly),
        SRC-032 (annual Jan 1)

YAML example::

    triggers:
      sourcing_daily:   "0 0 * * *"
      curation_daily:   "5 0 * * *"
      curation_weekly:  "0 1 * * 0"
      curation_monthly: "0 2 1 * *"
      curation_annual:  "0 3 1 1 *"

sourcing_daily.description: Cron for daily sourcing run — 00:00 UTC (SRC-009).
sourcing_daily.title: Sourcing Daily

curation_daily.description: Cron for daily curation run — 00:05 UTC (SRC-029).
curation_daily.title: Curation Daily

curation_weekly.description: Cron for weekly curation run — 01:00 UTC Sunday (SRC-030).
curation_weekly.title: Curation Weekly

curation_monthly.description: Cron for monthly curation run — 02:00 UTC 1st of month (SRC-031).
curation_monthly.title: Curation Monthly

curation_annual.description: Cron for annual curation run — 03:00 UTC January 1st (SRC-032).
curation_annual.title: Curation Annual

TriggersConfig.title: TriggersConfig

description: JSON Schema for configs/scheduler.yaml. Defines retry policy, cron triggers, API settings, and agent registry. Requirement traces: SRC-052, SRC-072, SRC-144, SRC-147.

triggers.description: Cron trigger times for all jobs (SRC-052).

agents.description: Registry of all agent configurations (SRC-072). Each enabled agent gets a full set of 5 scheduled jobs (sourcing + 4 curation cadences).
agents.title: Agents
